creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Attempt to classify this. 

Apparently one of the main problems is in net/openldap24-server, so 
initially assign it to delphij.  However, IIUC, security/krb5 may also 
be affected, so notify cy@. 

Both of you will have to try to triage this wit the submitter.
